name: Whitestrake's Retribution
location: Lanalda Pond in Greenshade, Westwind Lighthouse in Rivenspire, Weeping Wamasu Falls in Shadowfen

bonuses.stat: When you take damage while you are under 30% Health, you gain a damage shield that absorbs 303-13035 damage for 6 seconds. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds.
